description:
Create an interactive clinical case study in TiddlyWiki titled 'Case Study: Community-Acquired Pneumonia' with the tags 'CaseStudy', 'Pulmonology', and 'Teaching'. The tiddler must include a visible top section with patient demographics (58-year-old male) and chief complaint (productive cough and fever for 5 days). Implement four collapsible sections, each using a specific state tiddler for its toggle state:
- History of Present Illness (state: $:/state/case-pneumonia/history): progressive cough, rusty sputum, rigors, right-sided pleuritic chest pain; PMH: Type 2 diabetes, hypertension, former smoker.
- Physical Examination (state: $:/state/case-pneumonia/exam): Temp 39.2°C, HR 110, RR 24, BP 128/78, SpO2 92%; dullness to percussion, bronchial breath sounds at right lower zone, coarse crackles.
- Investigations (state: $:/state/case-pneumonia/investigations): WBC 18,500/μL, CRP 245 mg/L, Procalcitonin 2.8 ng/mL; CXR showing right lower lobe consolidation.
- Diagnosis and Management (state: $:/state/case-pneumonia/diagnosis): Community-acquired pneumonia (CURB-65 score 2); IV amoxicillin-clavulanate, macrolide, and oxygen therapy.
Save the tiddler upon completion.
